title: anthurium coripatense
intro: Anthurium coripatense, also known as the 'Peruvian Lily', is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. It is known for its medicinal properties, including the ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Anthurium coripatense are typically made by infusing the leaves in water, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
